name: Tower Emoji Defense
author: Poki
description: Tower Emoji Defense is a merge game where emojis become your ultimate defenders!️ Start with a single emoji and face waves of incoming enemies, then buy more emojis and place them strategically to protect your tower. Merge and upgrade them to unlock stronger defenders, earn money from each victory, and build the ultimate emoji army. The waves keep coming—so plan smart and power up! Ready to defend with emojis? How to play Tower Emoji Defense? Click or tap to make the choice. Click and hold to move emojis Who created Tower Emoji Defense? Tower Emoji Defense is created by pgs1000. Play their other games on Poki: Emoji Dropper and Emoji Builder ! How can I play Tower Emoji Defense for free? You can play Tower Emoji Defense for free on Poki. Can I play Tower Emoji Defense on mobile devices and desktop? Tower Emoji Defense can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
